subject: Arrokuda, a barracuda-like fish Pokemon swimming through dark water in a stylized geometric art style
description: A barracuda-shaped fish Pokemon rendered in angular, stylized brushwork swims through dark blue water. It has a long, narrow body in shades of dark teal and gray with a pale underbelly, and its expression suggests forward-driving aggression. The art style uses blocky, expressive shapes and visible texture rather than smooth gradients, giving the scene an illustrative, almost woodcut quality. The background is a deep blue underwater environment with stylized bubbles and wave-line elements. The creature fills most of the frame, oriented in a purposeful forward drive.
foreground: Arrokuda swimming forward, long narrow body, sharp snout, angular stylized rendering
background: Deep blue underwater scene with stylized bubbles and wave marks
emotion: aggressive, driven — forward-charging posture and sharp-featured expression
